title: Mari is smokin
wikitext:
[]: Mari is smokin'! Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:09 am [Eh, this one really isn't that tasteful] sorry i just feel like we need one of these threads for mari as well, maybe one for Misato. actually it's just an excuse for me to share that pic with EGF members

[]: Post by toe mash » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:26 am Well we had a Mari one but it didn't exactly go as we hoped.. Although we really need a Misato one. But I don't want to be the weirdo that starts one of those threads :P

[]: Post by Xard » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:32 am toe mash wrote: Although we really need a Misato one. But I don't want to be the weirdo that starts one of those threads :P

[]: Post by toe mash » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:44 am You speak as if you bought that dakimakura yourself, you poser!

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:56 am I remember seeing a picture of an EGF member on the pictures thread where she looks exactly like Mari, after that, animated Mari lost her appeal for me.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Apr 02, 2011 8:14 am toe mash wrote: Well we had a Mari one but it didn't exactly go as we hoped...

[]: Post by Fireball » Sat Apr 02, 2011 8:22 am Mari is boiling.

[]: Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 8:31 am guys... can we please get back on the topiczz? post some hot mari pics u come to find, pretty please

[]: Post by symbv » Sat Apr 02, 2011 9:53 am toe mash wrote: You speak as if you bought that dakimakura yourself, you poser!

[]: Post by Oz » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:06 am symbv wrote: I give him credit at least for not going into berserk mode and rip that dakimakura apart :)

[]: Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:09 am symbv wrote: Somebody needs to explain why Mari is hot. Have not watched Rebuild (and not intend to until all the movies are done). I always feel a bit jealous of Mari because I have a feeling she is there to steal the limelight from Asuka. And I know she got the moe points of glasses (megane) and in-charge girls, but how does this make her hot??

[]: Post by Merridian » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:18 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Any thread Chee posts doesn't belong in the continuity of anything else that's been posted. Nor do they even belong in the natural order of life.

[]: Post by toe mash » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:20 am symbv wrote: Somebody needs to explain why Mari is hot.

[]: Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:29 am toe mash wrote: Okay well I'm not really sure myself but I did some research.. ...Hmm, I still don't really get it...

[]: Post by bigbadtyrant » Sat Apr 02, 2011 11:34 am I think a better name for this thread would have been "Mari is Smokin!"

[]: Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 11:38 am Asuka's hot, Mari is spicy.

[]: Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 11:46 am bigbadtyrant wrote: I think a better name for this thread would have been "Mari is Smokin!"

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Apr 02, 2011 11:54 am about bloody time we get another Mari thread that dosen't get immediately locked SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sat Apr 02, 2011 11:56 am Oh, crap. Let's see: one for Rei, one for Asuka, and now, for Mari... WHERE'S THE LOVE FOR THE ADULTS, DAMN IT?!
